situation: The government has introduced restrictions on freedom of speech, and the media is facing challenges in reporting on the conflict.

options.consequence: Limited ability to report on the conflict

consequence_if_wrong: Limited ability to report on the conflict
rationale: Challenging the restrictions is necessary to ensure that the media can continue to report on the conflict and hold those in power accountable.

situation: Russian forces are targeting Ukrainian media outlets and journalists, posing a significant threat to their safety and freedom of speech.
common_rookie_mistake: Failing to take measures to protect journalists
rationale: Taking measures to protect journalists is necessary to ensure their safety and ability to continue reporting on the conflict.
